prereq_merge_sequence.fix: UX-01 frame_pacer landing on main so macOS-14 stability test stops flaking PR #512 CI
MSRV alignment (Rust 1.86 / Cargo.lock format) so the MSRV gate is reachable from PR #512
Timing / scheduler hardening prerequisite for the rebased PR #512 CI run
Pre-A3 macOS-14 hot-reload config-watcher canonicalised paths

actionlint.notes: All workflows lint clean after CI-01 matrix expansion, the macOS-13 queue-mitigation narrowing, and the test-only follow-up commit `922eab5`. Re-run command: `actionlint .github/workflows/ci.yml .github/workflows/contract-weekly.yml .github/workflows/issue-hygiene.yml` (binary at $USERPROFILE/.copilot/bin/actionlint.exe).

test_only_followup_commit.subject: test(pty): wait for onboarding config persistence
test_only_followup_commit.rationale: Wait for onboarding config persistence (Windows PTY flake). Test-only change — no production source, no workflow, no required-check surface modified. The required-check contracts in §2.1–§2.4 of CI-01-required-checks.md are unchanged; the §2.6 macOS-13 narrowing is unchanged.

workflow_dispatch_run.notes: This is the canonical PR-checks run on the current head 922eab5 after the test-only follow-up commit to parent 43b2f5a. The parallel push-event run on the same head is `26381963199` (https://github.com/magicpro97/tui-translator/actions/runs/26381963199, conclusion=success, created_at=2026-05-25T03:41:29Z, updated_at=2026-05-25T03:59:40Z); together the two runs comprise the 46/46 check-runs reported on the PR head. The pull_request run is selected as the canonical evidence because branch-protection contexts are surfaced from PR-event checks.

push_event_run.notes: Parallel push-event CI run on the same head 922eab5; recorded for completeness so the 46/46 check-run total on the PR head is traceable.

prior_head_runs_for_continuity.note: Runs on the immediate parent commit (pre test-only follow-up). Retained for audit continuity per pr512-ci-macos13-queue-mitigation.md.

final_check_summary.matrix_note: macOS-13 permutations were removed in commit 43b2f5a as a queue-mitigation; the 46/46 total is on the narrowed matrix (Windows + macOS-14 + Linux + MSRV + VMIC + features) and is preserved unchanged on the test-only follow-up head 922eab5. See §2.6 of CI-01-required-checks.md.

post_rebase_verified_jobs.note: MSRV gate green on head 922eab5 (PR #516 alignment landed).

post_rebase_verified_jobs.name: Cross-platform build (macos-14, default)
post_rebase_verified_jobs.note: macOS-14 Apple-silicon build green post-rebase + post-mitigation + post test-only follow-up.

post_rebase_verified_jobs.name: PTY tests (Windows ConPTY)
post_rebase_verified_jobs.note: Green on head 922eab5 — validates the test-only follow-up `wait for onboarding config persistence`.

post_rebase_verified_jobs.name: Beta toolchain (allowed-fail)
post_rebase_verified_jobs.note: Documented allowed-fail context (continue-on-error: true). Reported as success on this head but is NOT a required branch-protection context.

macos13_matrix_removed.reason: GitHub-hosted macos-13 runner pool kept the three macos-13 matrix permutations in `queued` for >19 hours on prior run 26360760221, indefinitely blocking PR #512. Removed from .github/workflows/ci.yml matrix in commit 43b2f5a; this is NOT a claim that macos-13 ever passed.

next_steps: Post-merge: orchestrator updates branch-protection on `main` so `required_status_checks.contexts` reflects the narrowed matrix in §2.1–§2.4 of CI-01-required-checks.md (i.e. the three removed macos-13 contexts in §2.6 are excluded).
Future: revisit Intel macOS coverage if/when GitHub-hosted macos-13 queue stabilises or a self-hosted runner becomes available; track via the queue-mitigation audit doc.
